news.title:
Varun Beverages sets April 8, 2026, as the record date for final dividend eligibility.
Final dividend of Re.0.50 per share approved, payment starts April 10, 2026.
news.summary:
Varun Beverages sets April 8, 2026, as the record date for final dividend eligibility.
Final dividend of Re.0.50 per share approved, payment starts April 10, 2026.

news.title:
Varun Beverages posted FY25 net revenues of INR 216.9bn (+8.4% y/y) with 7.9% volume growth and international traction.
Despite 16.2% net profit rise to INR 30.6bn, its stock fell 26.7%, presenting a potential 46% upside per analysts.
news.summary:
Varun Beverages posted FY25 net revenues of INR 216.9bn (+8.4% y/y) with 7.9% volume growth and international traction.
Despite 16.2% net profit rise to INR 30.6bn, its stock fell 26.7%, presenting a potential 46% upside per analysts.

news.title:
Varun Beverages' subsidiary acquired 100% share capital of Twizza Proprietary Ltd in South Africa.
The acquisition valued at ZAR 2,053M (INR 11,398M) makes Twizza a step-down subsidiary.
news.summary:
Varun Beverages' subsidiary acquired 100% share capital of Twizza Proprietary Ltd in South Africa.
The acquisition valued at ZAR 2,053M (INR 11,398M) makes Twizza a step-down subsidiary.

news.title:
Stocks to watch include Maruti Suzuki, Tata Steel, TCS, PNB, Varun Beverages, and Urban Company due to key developments.
Strides Pharma, Varun Beverages, and Tata Steel announce strategic acquisitions, while TCS expands Chennai office by 1.47 lakh sq ft.
news.summary:
Stocks to watch include Maruti Suzuki, Tata Steel, TCS, PNB, Varun Beverages, and Urban Company due to key developments.

news.title:
Urban Company sees DF International Partners II LLC exit via block deal; Tata Steel merges NINL, plans $2B investment.
Maruti Suzuki faces ₹5,786-cr tax order; Varun Beverages acquires 100% stake in Crickley Dairy via its SA subsidiary.
news.summary:
Urban Company sees DF International Partners II LLC exit via block deal; Tata Steel merges NINL, plans $2B investment.
Maruti Suzuki faces ₹5,786-cr tax order; Varun Beverages acquires 100% stake in Crickley Dairy via its SA subsidiary.

news.title: Varun Beverages to acquire 100% of Crickley Dairy for ₹1.31B.
news.summary: Varun Beverages to acquire 100% of Crickley Dairy for ₹1.31B.

news.title:
Several major stocks, including Kotak Bank, HUL, and Varun Beverages, hit 52-week lows amid extended losing streaks.
Notable corrections include Five Star Finance (-57%), Tata Motors PV (-55%), and Trent (-43%) from their respective 52-week highs.
news.summary:
Several major stocks, including Kotak Bank, HUL, and Varun Beverages, hit 52-week lows amid extended losing streaks.
Notable corrections include Five Star Finance (-57%), Tata Motors PV (-55%), and Trent (-43%) from their respective 52-week highs.

news.title:
Varun Beverages hits 52-week low, down 4% on March 12; analysts project 34% upside.
Stock down nearly 8% in March, 25% off from 52-week high; summer demand may boost recovery.
news.summary:
Varun Beverages hits 52-week low, down 4% on March 12; analysts project 34% upside.
Stock down nearly 8% in March, 25% off from 52-week high; summer demand may boost recovery.

news.title:
Varun Beverages approves acquiring 23% equity in Jager Renewables for Rs. 7.05 Cr, increasing stake to 49%.
Corporate guarantee of ZAR 1,240M issued for subsidiary Bevco in favor of FirstRand Bank.
news.summary:
Varun Beverages approves acquiring 23% equity in Jager Renewables for Rs. 7.05 Cr, increasing stake to 49%.
Corporate guarantee of ZAR 1,240M issued for subsidiary Bevco in favor of FirstRand Bank.

The total trade value amounted to Rs. 45.76 crores.
news.summary:

news.title:
Varun Beverages Ltd surged 3.2% intraday on 5 Mar 2026, hitting Rs 444.4.
The stock outperformed Beverages sector and Sensex after a 3-day decline.
news.summary:

news.summary: Jefferies maintains buy call on Varun Beverages, cuts target price to ₹550.

news.title:
Varun Beverages partners with Carlsberg to sell alcoholic drinks in Africa.
A new plant is planned for next year; profit margins may align with India.
news.summary:
Varun Beverages partners with Carlsberg to sell alcoholic drinks in Africa.
A new plant is planned for next year; profit margins may align with India.

news.title:
Varun Beverages aims snacks sales growth in high-teens, nearing $100M revenue in 2-3 years.
Low capex in India for CY '26; focus on South Africa expansion sans Twizza acquisition.
news.summary:
Varun Beverages aims snacks sales growth in high-teens, nearing $100M revenue in 2-3 years.
Low capex in India for CY '26; focus on South Africa expansion sans Twizza acquisition.

news.title:
Varun Beverages sees growth in India and abroad via positive demographics, rising incomes, and robust distribution.
It cites ample capacities, diverse product range, and strong network for sustained profitability.
news.summary:
Varun Beverages sees growth in India and abroad via positive demographics, rising incomes, and robust distribution.
It cites ample capacities, diverse product range, and strong network for sustained profitability.

news.title:
Varun Beverages posted YoY growth in net sales and profit.
Sequentially, net sales fell 14.1% and net profit dropped 66% due to seasonality.
news.summary:
Varun Beverages posted YoY growth in net sales and profit.
Sequentially, net sales fell 14.1% and net profit dropped 66% due to seasonality.

news.title:
BSE Sensex surged 2,073 pts to 83,739; NSE Nifty gained 639 pts to 25,728, marking the biggest single-day gain since May 2025 due to India-US trade deal.
BSE market cap rose ₹12 lakh crore; textile, shrimp, gems, and financial stocks saw strong gains, while PB Fintech and Varun Beverages declined.
news.summary:
BSE Sensex surged 2,073 pts to 83,739; NSE Nifty gained 639 pts to 25,728, marking the biggest single-day gain since May 2025 due to India-US trade deal.
BSE market cap rose ₹12 lakh crore; textile, shrimp, gems, and financial stocks saw strong gains, while PB Fintech and Varun Beverages declined.

news.title:
Varun Beverages confirms minimal capital allocation for alcoholic beverage distribution.
The company expects overall capital expenditure this year to remain limited.
news.summary:
Varun Beverages confirms minimal capital allocation for alcoholic beverage distribution.
The company expects overall capital expenditure this year to remain limited.
